Name: TORCH_CTRL_PARAM
Description: Defines torch behavior parameters, including visual effects, light source control, and duration.

Fields.Name: SFX ID
Fields.Description: ID of the visual special effect used by the torch flame.

Fields.Name: Light Source ID
Fields.Description: ID of the light source associated with the torch.

Fields.Name: Lifetime (Seconds)
Fields.Description: Duration in seconds before the torch effect expires.
